task_description: Redesign the Deekshi Global Exim website to match the style of professional export companies. Remove all state-specific references (AP, Telangana), excessive badges, promotional clutter. Add Dehydrated Products category. Make it clean, professional, trust-focused with proper certifications display.

verification.summary: npm run build compiles all pages successfully. All state-specific references removed from homepage, products, and about pages. Only remaining Telangana references are in contact page and footer as physical business address (legitimate). Dehydrated Products category properly added with Garlic Powder and Onion Powder.
